outreach_draft.subject: Gatekeeper Liability Recovery — Offshore Fraud Judgment — International Enforcement
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Counsel,

I am reaching out regarding an international fraud recovery matter that may align with Mayer Brown's international enforcement and asset recovery practice.

Our client holds an uncollected fraud judgment against an offshore foreign corporation (Chinese-registered entity). The defendant has no reachable assets. The recovery strategy pursues gatekeeper liability — auditors, financial institutions, and professional advisors who were positioned to prevent or identify the fraud — seeking settlement rather than extended litigation.

Mayer Brown's experience recovering on behalf of a Japanese banking corporation through injunctions in U.S. operations — and your bilateral familiarity with auditor liability from both sides — reflects strong alignment with this recovery model.

I would welcome a brief preliminary conversation. No commitment implied. Case details available under mutual NDA.

Sincerely,
[SENDER_NAME]
Corporate Z | Judgment Monetization Group
